en: Me and my wife went to a wedding two weeks ago and when you get to a certain age this is dancing
two-stepping that's all you gotta do is one move stomach out stomach in stomach out stomach in
stomach out stomach in stomach out stomach in stomach out stomach in that's all you gotta do
we dancing next to this 50-year-old woman and this bitch started doing all the sierra
shit and i was still smiling but in my mind i was saying if this bitch kicked me in the fema
i'ma knock her the fuck out
just keep the beat you big bitch
